### useFocus()

监听Input 和 TextArea 焦点变更

```typescript
useFocus: <T extends HTMLTextAreaElement | HTMLInputElement>({ inputRef, onFocusChange, autoFocus, }: {
    autoFocus: boolean;
    inputRef: React.RefObject<T>;
    onFocusChange?: (focused: boolean, event: Event) => void;
}) => void
```

#### useFocus的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  { inputRef, onFocusChange, autoFocus, } | { autoFocus: boolean; inputRef: React.RefObject&lt;T&gt;; onFocusChange?: (focused: boolean, event: Event) =&gt; void; } |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

void
